methodsAttempted.query: site:leeds.ac.uk University of Leeds generative AI policy students assessment academic integrity
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search located University of Leeds GenAI assessment guidance, Library academic-integrity guidance, Secretariat staff guidance, postgraduate researcher guidance, and a faculty-specific Business School page.

methodsAttempted.query: site:leeds.ac.uk University of Leeds generative AI staff guidance artificial intelligence teaching research data privacy approved tools
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search located central staff guidance, data restrictions and security, approved-tool guidance, and assessment-category pages on Leeds-controlled domains.

methodsAttempted.query: site:leeds.ac.uk University of Leeds postgraduate researchers generative AI guidance Copilot confidential data thesis authorship
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search located postgraduate researcher assessment-category guidance, data restrictions, research procedures, and downloadable PGR guidance.
Followed official related links among the University of Leeds GenAI assessment, acknowledgement, data-restriction, tools, and postgraduate researcher pages.

artifacts.summary: Official University of Leeds discovery found central GenAI assessment, acknowledgement, staff, data-security, approved-tool, postgraduate researcher, and Library academic-integrity guidance. The LUBS Business School page was checked but rejected for approved University-level claims because it is faculty-specific.

artifacts.title: University of Leeds GenAI staged source review
artifacts.summary: Staged University of Leeds official-source bundle for QS 2026 rank 86. Sources cover central GenAI assessment guidance, assessment categories, GenAI acknowledgement, data restrictions, postgraduate researcher assessment categories, staff AI guidance, GenAI tools, and Library academic-integrity guidance. The LUBS Business School page was rejected for University-wide claims because it is faculty-scoped.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
Claims remain staged agent-reviewed candidates and are not canonical until human or deterministic publication review promotes them.

Direct plain HTTP from the local Codex environment returned 403 for several Leeds WordPress subdomains; Firecrawl retrieved the public pages with status 200 and no login, paywall, CAPTCHA, MFA, or robots bypass was attempted.
Faculty-specific LUBS guidance was recorded as rejected and was not used to support University-wide claim candidates.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
